worker_prompt: Shape and simulate publication of the complete Ready item set for the supplied packet. Return exact stored item bodies, coverage, graph and frontier, profiles and matrices, read-back, operation log, and one stopped recommendation.
context: Setup is compatible. The source owner reviewed and authorized the complete derived design R52. Current schema v2 stores timezone and retry count. A v1 record has no timezone. Migration must keep supported reads operable, write valid v2, resume safely after an interruption, and prove rollback before old reads are removed. Additional packet notes say the team formed in 2019, three UI mockups were abandoned, one participant suggested renaming every helper, a meeting opened with greetings, and an appendix contains example tracker HTTP commands.

source_packet.outcome: Migrate scheduled jobs to schema v2 and display retry limit.

C2 display the configured retry limit
acceptance: prove absent, current, incompatible, interruption, restart, rollback, and guarded-removal behavior
display is a pure current read of the configured retry limit
